title: Xtra Flaky Syrian Lamb Flatbread
description: A classic Syrian flatbread filled with lamb, topped with a sweet and tangy rasberry jam, all wrapped up in a crispy and flaky pastry. Perfect for a lazy Sunday meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine lamb, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Roll out the pastry dough on a floured surface to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Place the lamb mixture onto one half of the pastry dough, leaving a 1/2 inch border.
Brush the edges of the pastry with coconut oil.
Fold the other half of the pastry dough over the lamb mixture, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the flatbread on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the top of the flatbread with coconut oil.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Spread the raspberry jam on top of the flatbread.
